allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\raoof\\Downloads" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "chicken|دجاج|poultry|farm"} | Format-Table Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\raoof\\Documents" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "chicken|دجاج|poultry|farm"} | Format-Table Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\raoof" -Recurse -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "chicken|دجاج|poultry|farm"} | Format-Table FullName)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; repos=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], r['url']\) for r in repos if 'chicken' in r['name'].lower\(\) or 'tshiken' in r['name'].lower\(\)]")
PowerShell(gh repo list --json name,url --limit 100 | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object {$_.name -match "chicken"} | Format-Table name, url)
